name: OneSignal MCP
description: Official OneSignal MCP — send push notifications, email, and SMS, manage audience segments, check delivery stats, and update messaging templates.

skills.name: Send Notifications
skills.description: Sends push notifications, email, and SMS messages to audience segments using OneSignal's delivery infrastructure.

skills.name: Audience Management
skills.description: Creates, updates, and queries audience segments for targeted messaging based on user attributes and behaviors.

skills.name: Campaign Analytics
skills.description: Retrieves delivery stats, open rates, and notification outcomes for sent campaigns across all channels.
